_credits: Custom data format: https://github.com/microsoft/vscode-css-languageservice/blob/main/docs/customData.md | Tailwind v4 atDirectives reference: https://gist.github.com/steschwa/5a5b859caa0f96a3ada02b4dca145c44 | Tailwind directives docs: https://tailwindcss.com/docs/functions-and-directives

atDirectives.name: @import
atDirectives.description: Inline import CSS files, including Tailwind.

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Define custom design tokens (fonts, colors, breakpoints).

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Specify source files for content detection.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Add custom utilities that work with variants.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Apply a Tailwind variant to styles.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Inline utility classes into custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @reference
atDirectives.description: Import main stylesheet for reference (e.g. in Vue/Svelte or CSS modules).

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Load a legacy JavaScript config file.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Define a cascade layer (Tailwind / base / components / utilities).
